column1: Table 18: Gross, net attendance rates in primary school level (6-11 years) by sex and residence

column2: [1] GAR is the number of students attending a given level of education at any time during the reference academic year, regardless of age, expressed as a percentage of the official school-age population corresponding to the same level of education.

[2] NAR is the number of pupils in the official age group for a given level of education who attend school at that level expressed as a percentage of the population in that age group. Table 17 includes the numbers used to calculate those indicators by sex and area of residence.
